National Sports Platform

Snt.L.Mo. Sports Network

The Home of Every Athlete

A national sports platform built for athletes, coaches, schools, recruiters, families, fans, highlights, rankings, live games, team stores, and Zeus AI scouting.

Top Athletes

Live rankings powered by the Zeus rating grid.

School Spotlight

Build school pages for every program in the country.

Vashon Wolverines

Football, basketball, track, alumni history, team store, and athlete profiles.

St. Louis Programs

Public, private, suburban, and elite programs connected in one sports network.

National Expansion

Missouri first, then Illinois, Texas, Florida, Georgia, California, and all 50 states.

Recruiting Portal

Search athletes by sport, position, school, class, city, state, and Zeus rating.

Coach Accounts

Coaches can manage rosters, verify athletes, upload highlights, and build recruiting boards.

College Recruiters

Recruiters can discover verified athletes with stats, video, GPA, offers, and contact info.

Player Profiles

Every athlete gets a profile with film, stats, awards, school info, and recruiting status.

Zeus AI

AI Scouting. Rankings. Recruiting Reports.

Zeus AI will help evaluate film, write scouting reports, compare athletes, and give players a professional recruiting profile.

Example Zeus Report

Elite acceleration. Strong competitive motor. High-level upside with improved technique and verified game film.

Million-Dollar Platform Features

Built to compete with Hudl, MaxPreps, On3, 247Sports, Rivals, and ESPN.
